name: After Hours Dump
description: Camera-roll style set with flash moments, texture, and intentional imperfection for social-first storytelling.

promptStyle.base: editorial lifestyle photography, candid framing, direct flash accents, natural skin texture, motion micro-blur, documentary social aesthetic
promptStyle.neg: plastic skin, over-retouched beauty pass, sterile studio look, generic stock setup, heavy typography

shotList: tight detail of hands and objects
on-camera flash moment in low light
